fmea_tracking_drift.cause: No reconciliation tool; aggregate counts maintained in prose; individual hardening artifacts not aggregated

S489 artifact text (39 total) contradicts JSON (41 total)
S489 artifact text (6 ADEQUATE) contradicts JSON (8 ADEQUATE)

fmea_tracking_drift.meta_pattern: FM-22 (creation-maintenance asymmetry) applies to the FMEA registry itself — creating hardening artifacts is easy, maintaining aggregate state is unfunded
